problems_encountered.description: Tool would create a new app installation copy in production environment. Executing would create actual resources and consume quota/storage in production account.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - would create production resources
execution_notes: This tool copies an existing app installation to create a duplicate. Requires installationId and description parameters. Prerequisites met (app installation a-v2tmw9 exists), but executing would create actual app installation copy in production environment, consuming resources and potentially affecting billing. Should be avoided during evaluation.
